overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a white-haired armored character exploring a pristine mountain river valley. The character wades through crystal-clear turquoise water and traverses rocky shores surrounded by dense pine forests and mist-covered peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow mountain river with forested banks

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow turquoise river water surrounded by pine forests and mountain peaks

entered.detail: crystal clear shallow water with visible rocky riverbed
rocky shoreline with pebbles and boulders
dense coniferous trees covering the hillside
tall mountains partially covered in clouds and mist

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the shallow turquoise waters of a mountain river. The scene is dominated by crystal-clear water revealing the rocky riverbed below, with dense pine forests lining the banks and misty peaks visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank path beneath steep cliff face

events.description: character exits the river and steps onto the rocky gravel shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow rocky shore with a steep cliff face on the left and the river on the right

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall rising directly beside the path
rocky and pebble-covered ground along the water's edge
clusters of red flowers growing on the cliffside

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to land, walking along a narrow gravel path squeezed between a steep rocky cliff on the left and the turquoise river on the right. Red wildflowers dot the cliffside as the path continues through the mountain valley.

events.description: character begins sprinting causing heavy motion blur and rapid scene movement

agents.ego_description: sprinting rapidly along the rocky riverbank with significant motion blur affecting visibility

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a sprint, creating heavy motion blur as they rapidly traverse the rocky shoreline. The cliff face recedes into the distance as the character moves quickly through the riverside terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside clearing with abandoned wooden cart

events.description: approaching an abandoned wooden cart on the riverbank
character stops walking and looks around at the surrounding mountain scenery

agents.ego_description: approaching a wooden cart and observing the surrounding mountain valley, then stopping to look around

entered.detail: abandoned wooden cart with wheels sitting on the riverbank
tall bare trees without leaves standing near the water

segments.scene_description: The character slows down and approaches an abandoned wooden cart on a wider section of the riverbank. Dead leafless trees stand near the water's edge as the character stops to observe the expansive mountain valley and surrounding forest before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in the shallow currents of a mountain river and progresses toward a wide, desolate riverbank. It begins with the character wading through crystal-clear turquoise water, with the rocky riverbed visible beneath the surface and misty peaks looming over dense pine forests. As the character transitions to land, the scene shifts to a narrow gravel path squeezed between the flowing river and a steep rocky cliff dotted with red wildflowers. The camera then accelerates into a blur of motion as the character sprints along the rocky shoreline, causing the cliff face to recede rapidly into the distance. Finally, the pace slows as the character approaches an abandoned wooden cart and leafless trees, coming to a halt to overlook the expansive mountain valley and surrounding forest.
